doctor.all_services_are_carried: All services are carried out under the direct supervision of the college faculty members

doctor.str_234: You can contact him to confirm, then:

doctor.click_delete_to_cancel: Click "Delete" to cancel the reservation and remove it permanently.

doctor.the_thootha_support_team: The Thootha support team is dedicated to helping students manage their cases and solve any technical problems they face.
doctor.how_do_i_delete: How do I delete a status I posted?
doctor.you_can_delete_the: You can delete the status from the “My Orders” section in the side menu.
doctor.why_is_my_phone: Why is my phone number not showing up to patients?
doctor.the_number_is_only: The number is only shown to patients whose reservation is confirmed to ensure they are serious.
doctor.you_can_contact_us: You can contact us directly via email:
doctor.or_you_can_submit: Or you can submit your problem via the following form:
doctor.write_your_problem_here: Write your problem here in detail...
doctor.we_collect_the_following: We collect the following data to ensure quality of service:
doctor.university_data: University data and academic level (if any).
doctor.how_your_data_appears: How your data appears to patients?
doctor.how_data_appears_desc: Your name and specialty (and ratings) are shown to patients to help them choose the right student. Your phone number is only shown after the booking is confirmed (depending on application settings).
doctor.account_security_desc: We apply high security standards to protect your data and ensure that no unauthorized party has access to it.
doctor.str_297: We take strict security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
doctor.str_300: As a user of the application as a dental student, you acknowledge and agree to adhere to the professional and ethical rules in force in your college and under the supervision of faculty members.
doctor.n:
• The student is solely responsible for the medical procedures he performs.
• The application does not provide legal or insurance cover for the student.
• The patient must be clearly informed that you are a "student" and that the treatment takes place in an educational framework.
doctor.commitment_to_attending_scheduled:
• Commitment to attending scheduled appointments with patients.
• In the event of cancellation, the patient must be notified well in advance of the appointment.
• Repeated unexcused absences may lead to the closure of your account.
doctor.n_1:
• Maintaining the confidentiality and privacy of patient data.
• Dealing respectfully and professionally with all users of the application.
• It is prohibited to use patient data for any purpose outside the framework of educational treatment.
doctor.the_thoutha_application_is: The Thoutha application is a technical means of connection only and does not interfere in the therapeutic process or academic evaluation.

help_and_support.technical_support_is_limited: Technical support is limited only to technical problems related to the use of the application.
help_and_support.you_can_contact_us: You can contact us via email:
help_and_support.the_support_team_does: The support team does not intervene in any disputes or agreements between students and patients.
help_and_support.the_applications_role_is: The application's role is limited to connecting only the two parties.
help_and_support.if_you_encounter_any: If you encounter any technical problem while using the Thoutha application, or you have a question regarding registration or account, the technical support team is ready to help you.

onboarding.we_get_into_the: We get into the topic at length
onboarding.careful_monitoring_of_your: Careful monitoring of your dental health
onboarding.at_thootha_we_have: At Thootha, we have gathered the best students and dentists to provide you with real care at student prices. Your smile is in safe hands, with an elite group of the most skilled young doctors.
onboarding.choose_the_time_that: Choose the time that suits you and book with your favorite doctor in seconds. Our appointment booking service is easy, fast and secure.
onboarding.get_a_complete_history: Get a complete history of your treatments and upcoming appointments. We care about your smile from the first visit.

privacy_policy.the_application_may_collect: The application may collect the following data:

privacy_policy.the_data_is_only: The data is only used for:
privacy_policy.sending_notifications_to_the: Sending notifications to the doctor of a new reservation
privacy_policy.helping_the_user_through: Helping the user through a chatbot
privacy_policy.improve_the_user_experience: Improve the user experience within the application
privacy_policy.user_data_is_not: 🚫 User data is not sold or shared with any third party.
privacy_policy.contact_us_if_you: Contact us if you have any privacy-related inquiries
privacy_policy.we_are_committed_to: We are committed to taking appropriate technical measures to protect user data from unauthorized access or illegal use.
privacy_policy.the_user_has_the: The user has the right to:
privacy_policy.by_using_the_thoutha: By using the Thoutha application, you agree to this privacy policy.
privacy_policy.the_thoutha_application_is: The Thoutha application is keen to protect the privacy of its users, both patients and dental students. This policy explains how data is collected, used and protected within the app.
privacy_policy.by_using_the_thoutha_1: By using the Thoutha application, you automatically agree to this privacy policy.

terms_and_conditions.second_the_role_of: Second: The role of applying Thutha
terms_and_conditions.the_application_is_only: • The application is only a means of connection between the student and the patient.\n
terms_and_conditions.any_agreement_concluded_is: • Any agreement concluded is a direct agreement between the two parties.
terms_and_conditions.we_do_not_control: • We do not control the quality of treatment or its results.\n
terms_and_conditions.we_do_not_guarantee: • We do not guarantee that any party will attend the appointment.\n
terms_and_conditions.the_application_does_not: • The application does not guarantee the student’s commitment to attendance.\n
terms_and_conditions.the_thoutha_application_is: The Thoutha application is a free electronic application whose goal is to connect students of dental colleges with patients who wish to receive educational therapeutic services.\n\nThe application does not provide medical services, does not supervise treatment, and does not bear any medical or legal responsibility resulting from the interaction between the student and the patient.
terms_and_conditions.the_patient_is_responsible: • The patient is responsible for ensuring that he is dealing with a student and not a licensed doctor.\n
terms_and_conditions.the_application_is_not: • The application is not responsible for any medical or material damages.\n
terms_and_conditions.failure_to_attend_or: • Failure to attend or cancel the appointment. The application does not bear any responsibility.
terms_and_conditions.adherence_to_appointments_and: • Adherence to appointments and clear communication with patients.\n
terms_and_conditions.the_student_bears_full: • The student bears full responsibility for any medical procedure.\n
terms_and_conditions.the_application_has_the: • The application has the right to delete the account in case of misuse.
terms_and_conditions.the_student_acknowledges_that: • The student acknowledges that he is a dental student and not a doctor.\n
terms_and_conditions.thoutha_application_is_not: Thoutha application is not responsible for any medical diagnosis, treatment results, or disputes that occur between the student and the patient.
terms_and_conditions.your_use_of_the: Your use of the application means your full agreement to these terms.
